content:
Do your emails successfully download when you click the sync button?

If not, navigate to settings > account > fetching mail > Incoming server. Click 'next' to confirm if the connection to the server succeeds.

If you haven't already completed, you should allow Thunderbird to run in the background and exclude the app from any Android battery optimization.
creator: platform34

content:
The app doesn't currently support printing or saving emails to PDF.

Mozilla connect is the community platform to request and vote for new features and ideas. You're welcome to add your own ideas or up-vote an existing one.

https://connect.mozilla.org/t5/ideas/idb-p/ideas/label-name/thunderbird%20android

Printing and saving to PDF have been requested by the community, linked below.

https://connect.mozilla.org/t5/ideas/ability-to-print-email-messages/idi-p/71885 https://connect.mozilla.org/t5/ideas/save-message-as-pdf-in-thunderbird-for-android/idi-p/38989

The more votes received, the greater chance an idea has of being implemented. Please consider showing your support.
